specs:

---

PCA9685-based 16-channel PWM driver shield. Drives up to 16 servos or LED strips with 12-bit resolution per channel. Stackable — chain two for 32 channels on one I2C bus.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: PCA9685
  - **Voltage**: 5V-6V servo rail
  - **Interface**: I2C (addr 0x40)
  - **Channels**: 16 PWM (12-bit)
  - **Dimensions**: 62 x 42 x 12 mm
  - **Weight**: 14 g
